name: MoneyGram
description_short: St Matthews, KY MoneyGram at 291 N Hubbards Ln offers money transfer and check cashing services.
description_long:
The MoneyGram location at 291 N Hubbards Ln #130 in St Matthews, KY is a standalone check-cashing store serving the greater Louisville metropolitan area. Operating daily from 7 AM to 10 PM, this St Matthews branch provides convenient access to money transfer and financial services for local residents and businesses. The extended hours ensure customers in St Matthews can handle their financial needs at times that work for their schedule.

At this St Matthews, KY MoneyGram location, you can send money transfers domestically and internationally, cash checks, and access additional financial services. The trained staff are available to assist you with your specific transaction needs and can answer questions about services. To verify current offerings or to ask about specific services before visiting, contact the location at +1 502-895-8332.

If you're a St Matthews area resident who needs reliable check cashing or fast money transfer services, this location's daily 7 AM to 10 PM schedule accommodates most customer needs. Be sure to bring a valid government-issued ID when visiting for any transaction. MoneyGram provides straightforward financial services for your St Matthews money transfer and check-cashing needs.

pros: Extensive retail network with 23+ locations listed in Louisville alone, providing high geographic accessibility
Extended operating hours at Walmart locations (7 AM - 9 PM, seven days per week) compared to traditional banks
Online transaction initiation allows customers to start transfers remotely before completing at physical locations
Multiple service types available at single locations (money transfers, check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, bill payment)
No banking relationship required—serves unbanked and underbanked consumers effectively
Established global money transfer capabilities for domestic and international transfers
Simple identification requirement (legal form of ID) for access to cash services
cons: Transaction fees for money transfers, check cashing, and wire services are not disclosed on the website, making cost comparison difficult
Limited information provided about exchange rates for international transfers or comparative pricing
Dependent on retail partner availability—service quality and hours may vary by individual Walmart location
Website provides minimal detail about consumer protections, dispute resolution processes, or regulatory oversight
No indication of credit-building or financial wellness features that might help customers improve financial health
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers who need quick cash access without a bank account
People sending money domestically or internationally who value retail location convenience over online-only services
Consumers needing check cashing, money orders, or wire transfers outside traditional banking hours
Individuals without access to traditional banking who require bill payment services
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for unbanked and underbanked consumers who need convenient access to money transfer, check cashing, and bill payment services outside traditional banking hours. The primary caveat is that specific transaction fees and exchange rates are not transparently disclosed on the website, so consumers should contact locations directly for pricing before completing transactions.
